code:
import io
import string
import list

fn main() -> Unit
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line)
    let tokens = string.split_whitespace(line)
    mut nums: List<Int> = []
    mut i = 0
    while i < tokens.len()
      match tokens.get(i)
      when Some(t)
        match string.parse_int(t)
        when Some(n)
          nums = list.push(nums, n)
        when None
          ()
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
    mut prefix: List<Int> = []
    mut sum = 0
    mut j = 0
    while j < nums.len()
      match nums.get(j)
      when Some(n)
        sum = sum + n
        prefix = list.push(prefix, sum)
      when None
        ()
      end
      j = j + 1
    end
    mut out = ""
    mut k = 0
    while k < prefix.len()
      match prefix.get(k)
      when Some(v)
        if k == 0
          out = "#{v}"
        else
          out = "#{out} #{v}"
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      k = k + 1
    end
    println(out)
  when None
    println("")
  end
end
